title: Fix UI layout, RB partial supply display, Hallmark return flow, and Reconciliation order type preservation

requirements.text: Update the order row layout in TotalOrdersTab (and any other tabs using the same row structure) to exactly match IMG_6511-2: each child row must show the order number on the left with Qty and Wt below it, the generic/design type label (e.g. CHAIN, IPL) displayed to the right of the order number on a separate column in the middle, the date and ageing badge side by side to the right, and a red × delete icon on the far right. Remove the standalone checkbox column that currently appears on the left of each child row and instead make the entire row clickable to toggle row selection. The group header row must retain its checkbox, collapse arrow, design code, karigar name badge, order count, qty, and weight. The design code in the group header must remain clickable to open the DesignImageModal popup showing the design image.

quotes: Exactly match the display as shown in IMG_6511 ( with selecting the row by clicking anywhere on row & pop up display of design image when clicked on design code)

acceptanceCriteria: Child rows display: order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label in centre column, date + ageing badge on right, red × delete icon far right
Clicking anywhere on a child row toggles its selection (no dedicated checkbox column on child rows)
Group header checkbox still works for bulk select of all children
Clicking the design code in the group header opens the DesignImageModal with the correct design image

requirements.text: Fix the Ready tab so that when an RB order is partially supplied, the newly created supplied-portion order row is displayed in the Ready tab. Currently the supplied rows do not appear in the Ready tab after a partial supply operation.

quotes: When a RB order is partial supplied, the supplied order row isn't displaying in ready tab.

acceptanceCriteria: After performing a partial supply on an RB order, the supplied portion row appears in the Ready tab with status Ready
The remaining unsupplied portion continues to appear in Total Orders with Pending status
No other tabs or order rows are affected

requirements.text: Fix the Hallmark tab's 'Mark as Returned' action so that when an order with status Hallmark is marked as returned, that order row is moved to the Total Orders page with status set to Pending. Currently such orders do not appear in Total Orders after being marked as returned from the Hallmark tab.

quotes: When an order with status *Hallmark* in hallmark tab is selected and *marked as returned* such order rows be moved and get displayed in the total orders page with status *pending*

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Mark as Returned' on a Hallmark-status order removes it from the Hallmark tab
The returned order appears in the Total Orders tab with status Pending
No other status transitions or tab behaviours are changed

requirements.text: Fix the Reconciliation page so that the per-row parsed order type (RB, SO, or CO) is correctly preserved when rows are added to Total Orders. Currently all reconciliation rows are saved with type CO regardless of their parsed type.

quotes: reconciliation page is able to parse order type now, but still after being able to parse between RB/SO/CO for each row, when such rows is added to total orders it tends to display all such rows with type *CO*

acceptanceCriteria: Each reconciliation row carries its correctly parsed order type (RB, SO, or CO) when saved to the backend
Orders added from reconciliation appear in Total Orders with their correct type (RB rows show RB, SO rows show SO, CO rows show CO)
No other reconciliation behaviour or parsing logic is changed

constraints: Do not change any other tabs, features, or status update logic beyond the four issues specified
Do not alter any existing working functionality in the Ready, Hallmark, Total Orders, Karigar, Customer Orders, or Tag Printing tabs beyond what is explicitly required
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Redesigning any tab other than adjusting row layout to match IMG_6511-2
Changing the backend data schema beyond what is needed to preserve order type from reconciliation
